title: AI-Powered Candidate Verification/Screening & ATS
problem: Hiring managers were spending hours manually reviewing and verifying candidates. There was no intelligent layer to surface the verified candidates faster or reduce the burden on recruiters and hiring managers.
bullets: Defined the end-to-end product vision and workflow for an AI/ML-powered candidate application, screening and verification system
Scoped and integrated two third-party APIs to automate candidate data enrichment and verification
Ensured model output accuracy through rigorous testing and quality benchmarks before launch
Shipped a fully functional ATS with verification and screening built in — from zero to beta MVP
Operated with a small team, owning strategy, requirements, and QA end-to-end

title: Property Management App — Solo PM/Founder Build
problem: Property managers and tenants in smaller buildings (<50 units) were frustrated by the lack of ways to easily communicate with the community and each other about the happenings of the building. There was a clear gap for a focused, modern solution built around their actual workflows and providng a tool for these smaller buildings.
bullets: Conducted customer interviews and market analysis to identify unmet needs and define the product scope
Designed the full product architecture and roadmap from scratch — no team, no prior codebase
Built the entire MVP full-stack using React, Node.js, and Express
Validated the product with a real firm managing 100+ properties and potential users
Iterated on the product based on user feedback
statslabel1: Shipped the MVP and validated with a property management firm

title: Nostr Relay Hosting — Non-Technical User Onboarding
`problem: Running a Nostr relay required deep technical knowledge — server configuration, protocol expertise, and infrastructure management. This locked out the vast majority of people who wanted to participate in the decentralized Nostr network but lacked the skills to do so.
bullets: Sole PM on the product end-to-end — owned vision, roadmap, requirements, and stakeholder communication throughout
Designed a fully managed/hosted solution that abstracted all technical complexity, allowing non-technical users to launch their own relay with zero configuration
Led a cross-functional team of engineers and a designer from kickoff to a launch-ready product in 3–4 months
Built and executed a go-to-market strategy including a waitlist campaign and live showcase at Nostr World 2023

Product was fully built, waitlisted, and ready to ship — shut down solely due to investor pulling funding after unrelated work they were promoting at the conference was poorly received; our product was not a factor in their decision.

title: HR Platform Rollout Across M&A Engagements
problem: Enterprise clients going through mergers and acquisitions needed a unified HR platform to manage people data across the combined future state organization — each with different systems, structures, and compliance requirements - in order to plan their future state org.
bullets: Led end-to-end product lifecycle for an HR platform — from discovery and requirements through launch — across 5+ M&A clients in a year
Ran enterprise discovery sessions and user interviews to translate complex stakeholder needs into prioritized requirements
Designed and implemented RBAC, clean room protocols, and data-sharing restrictions to meet compliance requirements across clients
Built and delivered Power BI dashboards surfacing org analytics to support executive decision-making during integrations
Served as primary client contact, aligning executives and cross-functional stakeholders on product direction
Mentored five junior PMs through delivery, contributing to $500K+ in new revenue
